<!-- Thanks for contributing to scankit. Keep changes focused and behaviour-preserving. -->

## What & why

<!-- What does this change do, and why? Link any related issue (Fixes #123). -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change (API or behaviour)
- [ ] Docs / CI only

## Checklist

- [ ] `go build ./...`, `go vet ./...` and `go test -race ./...` pass
- [ ] `golangci-lint run ./...` is clean (no new lint exclusions)
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the behaviour change
- [ ] Exported symbols have doc comments; determinism (finding sort order) preserved
- [ ] Conventional Commit title; no secrets or generated artifacts committed
